description:
Overview:
1. High-quality lithium battery, short charging time, but longer working time
2. All-round cleaning, no dead ends, exquisite design can touch every corner of the car
3. Powerful cyclone suction, easy to remove dust from anywhere
4. Increased filter cup capacity, washable filter cups and filters to maintain strong suction

Notes:

1. The picture is for reference only. The actual product shall prevail. Your satisfaction is our greatest concern.
2. Before leaving neutral or negative feedback, please contact us to better resolve any issues.

Specification:

1、 7903black/7903white: 

 [Product Name]: Vehicle-mounted vacuum cleaner 

 [Product size]: about 18.5*15.5*6.5 cm 

 [Product Material]: ABS + Electronics 

[Line length]: 4.5 meters 

 [Battery capacity]: 2000mAh 

[Endurance time]: ≥ 12 min 

[Suction]: ≥ 4500 pa 

[Product Power]:  45W 

 2、A black/A white: 

 [Product Name]: Mini Portable Wireless Charging Gun Car Vacuum Cleaner

 [Product Power]: 120W Vacuum Suction 6000PA

 [Product size]: about 16.5*14.5*4cm

 [Product Material]: ABS + Copper Wire + Copper Motor + Aluminum Fan Blade


Package Content:
1 x Cleaner
